name: Cellar
note: Starter price 5g (formula 8g; starter exception per REPORT §pacing). Ambush tile (Smuggler / Knife Fighter / Saboteur). (Starter — no tech.)

name: Trading Post
note: Starter price 6g (formula 9g). Anchor for Caravan Guard / Smuggler. (Starter — no tech.)

name: Granary
note: Starter price 8g (formula 11g). Anchor for Forager / Miller. (Starter — no tech.)

name: Homestead
note: Starter price 5g (formula 11g). Multi-resource on-ramp — early-game first build aimed at all four basics. (Starter — no tech.)

name: Mason's Yard
note: Starter price 5g (formula 8g). Closes the stone-without-Mining gap so red T1 Library buys aren't gated on Mining + Mine T2. (Starter — no tech.)

name: Pen
note: Starter price 5g (formula 8g). Horse on-ramp without waiting for Stables T2. Lets defense recruit cavalry with horse altStat from round 2. (Starter — no tech.)

name: Hunter's Lodge
note: T1 base 5 + food (3) + prod (3) = 11. Anchor for Hunter / Tracker / Ranger. Requires Foraging.

name: Lumberyard
note: Starter price 5g (formula 11g). Reliable wood path for Library blue+green ladders. Requires Foraging (free T1 tech).

name: Mine
note: T2 base 10 + stone (3) + prod (3) − hp adder = 12. Sustained stone path; Mason's Yard handles T1. Requires Mining.

name: Smokehouse
note: T1 base 5 + food (3) + happy (3) = 11. Requires Cooking.

name: Mill
note: T2 base 10 + 2 food (6) + prod (3) − 1 = 18. Miller anchor. Requires Mill + Farming.

name: Tavern
note: T2 base 10 + 2 happy (6) + hp = 18. Brawler / Berserker anchor. Requires Beer Brewing.

name: Library
note: T2 base 10 + 2 sci (8) + hp = 20. Scholar / Witch Doctor anchor. Requires Reading.

name: Apothecary
note: T2 base 10 + sci (4) + happy (3) + hp = 18. Battle Medic / Witch Doctor anchor. Requires Chemistry.

name: Pottery
note: T2 base 10 + prod (3) + gold (4) = 17. Potter anchor. Requires Ceramics.

name: Looms
note: T2 base 10 + prod (3) + happy (3) + hp = 17. Requires Weaving.

name: Bath House
note: T2 base 10 + 2 happy (6) + hp = 18. Requires Plumbing.

name: Walls
note: T2 base 10 + def (5) + hp adder (4) = 19. Pikeman / Halberdier / Spearman / Sentry / Crossbowman anchor. Requires Walls + Masonry.

name: Watchtower
note: T2 base 10 + def (5) + happy (3) = 18. Watchman / Tracker / Sentry anchor. Requires Town Watch.

name: Barracks
note: T2 base 10 + atk (5) + hp adder = 17. Standard Bearer anchor. Requires Stick Fighting.

name: Stables
note: T2 base 10 + atk (5) + horse (3) + hp = 21. Light Cavalry / Heavy Cavalry / Lancer anchor. Requires Horseback Riding.

name: Forge
note: T2 base 10 + atk (5) + prod (3) + hp = 19. Sapper / Saboteur / Cutter / Berserker anchor. Requires Smithing.

name: Smithy
note: T2 base 10 + atk (5) + def (5) + hp = 20. Axeman / Halberdier anchor. Requires Smithing.

name: Quarry Camp
note: T2 base 10 + stone (3) + prod (3) + hp = 18. Pioneer anchor; second stone path alongside Mine. Requires Mining.

name: Workshop
note: T2 base 10 + 2 prod (6) + hp = 18. Trebuchet / Crossbowman / Pioneer anchor. Requires Apprenticeship.

name: Drill Yard
note: T2 base 10 + 2 atk (10) + hp = 24. Standard Bearer / Recruit Sergeant anchor. Requires Tactics.

name: Glassworks
note: T2 base 10 + sci (4) + prod (3) + hp = 19. Requires Glassblowing.

name: Tower
note: T3 base 18 + 2 def (10) + hp = 32. Watchman / Archer / Marksman / Sniper anchor. Requires Walls + Masonry.

name: Mint
note: T3 base 18 + 2 gold (8) = 26. Treasurer anchor. Requires Currency.

name: Market
note: T3 base 18 + 2 gold (8) = 26. Caravan Guard / Trader anchor. Requires Markets.

name: Counting House
note: T3 base 18 + 3 gold (12) + sci (4) − 2 = 32. Treasurer / Trader anchor. Requires Banking.

name: Bank
note: T3 base 18 + 4 gold (16) + hp = 36. Treasurer anchor. Requires Banking + Currency.

name: Print Shop
note: T3 base 18 + 2 sci (8) + gold (4) = 30. Scholar anchor. Requires Printing.

name: Cathedral
note: T3 base 18 + 4 happy (12) + sci (4) + hp = 36. Paladin anchor. Requires Religion + Masonry.

name: School
note: T3 base 18 + 3 sci (12) + happy (3) + hp = 36. Scholar / Witch Doctor anchor. Requires Pedagogy + Library.

name: Aqueduct
note: T3 base 18 + 2 food (6) + 2 happy (6) + hp = 32. Pioneer anchor. Requires Plumbing + Bridges.

name: Ironworks
note: T3 base 18 + steel (3) + 2 prod (6) + atk (5) + hp = 35. Reliable steel path for Library blue+red ladders. Sapper / Saboteur anchor. Requires Smelting + Smithing.

name: Armory
note: T3 base 18 + 2 def (10) + atk (5) = 33. Universal +1 hp tile. Requires Armor.

name: Garrison
note: T3 base 18 + 2 def (10) + happy (3) + hp = 33. Recruit Sergeant / Battle Medic / Heavy Cavalry anchor. Requires Logistics.

name: Citadel
note: T3 base 18 + 3 def (15) + hp = 41. Combat Engineer / Royal Guard / Army anchor. Requires Walls + Engineering.

name: Palace
note: T3 base 18 + 4 gold (16) + 3 happy (9) + hp = 50. Royal Guard / Standard Bearer anchor. Requires Leadership + Architecture.

name: Fortress
note: T3 base 18 + 5 def (25) + hp = 51. Pikeman / Paladin / Army anchor (firstStrike granted). Requires Walls + Plate Armor.
